description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a sprawling, L-shaped floor plan and a flat roof. The exterior features a combination of light beige and white walls, large rectangular windows, and several wooden posts or columns along the perimeter. There is a prominent wooden deck area at the center, flanked by two palm trees, and a detached rectangular pool situated nearby. The house includes multiple rooms, visible through the open layout, and a main entryway that is accentuated by a covered porch. The overall design is open and airy, with a focus on outdoor living spaces and clean, geometric lines.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped house with flat roof, large windows, a central wooden deck, and a detached pool.
description_view_0: This view shows the house's long facade with multiple windows, the central deck area, and palm trees at the center.
description_view_1: From this angle, the detached pool is clearly visible, as well as the main entryway and the arrangement of rooms along the side.
description_view_2: This perspective highlights the rear of the house, the wooden deck, and the pool directly in front, with palm trees marking the central axis.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the side wing of the house, the pool to the left, and the open layout of the rooms leading to the central deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, wooden posts, and a wide door, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
